title: Gene Expression (RNA seq)
author: Dono Rosana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Fastq file and count matrix used for the bulk RNA-seq analyses in "Disruption of Epithelial Integrity Drives Mesendoderm Differentiation in Human Induced Pluripotent Stem Cells by Enabling BMP and ACTIVIN Sensing", Rattier et al. 

 Preparation and sequencing of RNA was performed by GATC Biotech.
steps_raw:
Fastq file and count matrix used for the bulk RNA-seq analyses in "Disruption of Epithelial Integrity Drives Mesendoderm Differentiation in Human Induced Pluripotent Stem Cells by Enabling BMP and ACTIVIN Sensing", Rattier et al. 

 Preparation and sequencing of RNA was performed by GATC Biotech.
